form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr3) over 1720m at Melton, beaten 21 m by Popcornfriday (2:01.90) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $126. Before that, 7th (Fr3) over 2200m after showing early speed at this track was 2nd-2.29 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Starzinhereyes (2:43.00) in NR 48 to 52 on March 19 at $1.75. Gets the inside draw so can improve.

form.formComment: Finding it hard to put a couple of good runs together. Last start was 3rd (Fr5) over 1755m at Echuca beaten 6 m by Reign Em In (2:06.50) in NR 51 to 55 on April 5 at $34. Before that beaten 11 metres, seventh at Bendigo over 1650m NR 50 to 55 on April 1. Not as keen on his chances in this field.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of ten weeks. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 2.75 m finishing sixth after showing early speed, behind Clymenus at Melton over 1720m in a NR 60 to 69 on January 30 at $9. Prefer to see.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked behind a tiring runner leaving the back straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr2) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway beaten 8 m by Seasider (2:40.20) in 4-5yo LR No NR GH on April 4 at $10. Showed ability the run before when he raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by a nose (Fr1) at Riverina Paceway (2:41.30) beating War Dan Buddy in 4-5yo No NR GH on March 27 at $10 at the bell was 2nd-4.1. The form reads strongly and he is good enough to overcome the back row draw.
